     The Numbers Business Report

Superbad (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $121,463,226Details
International Box Office $48,491,916
Worldwide Box Office $169,955,142
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $137,218,372
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,787,189
Total $141,005,561
Further financial details...

Synopsis

High-school seniors Seth and Evan have high hopes for a graduation party: The co-dependent teens plan to score booze and babes so they can become part of the in-crowd, but separation anxiety and two bored police officers complicate the pair's self-proclaimed mission.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$33,052,411 (27.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.67 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:71.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$17,500,000 (worldwide box office is 9.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,948 opening theaters/3,069 max. theaters, 6.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $211,148,286

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 17th, 2007 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: November 19th, 2020 (Limited) (Australia)
July 14th, 2022 (Limited) (New Zealand)
January 2nd, 2024 (Limited), released as Superbad (スーパーバッド) (Japan)
September 18th, 2025 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: December 4th, 2007 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for pervasive crude and sexual content, strong language, drinking, some drug use and a fantasy/comic violent image - all involving teens
Running Time: 112 minutes
Plot point: Beat Cops, Coming of Age, False Identity, Loss Of Virginity
Source material: Judd Apatow Buddy Comedy
Subgenre: Teenage Sex Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Columbia Pictures, Judd Apatow
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
